inatpick 0.2.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Getting started with inatpick

Source: vignettes/inatpick.Rmd
inatpick.Rmd

Overview

inatpick provides a simple workflow for downloading photos and metadata from iNaturalist via its API. The three main functions are:

Function Description
inat_fetch() Fetch observations from the API
inat_download() Download photos to a local folder
inat_metadata() Export observation metadata to CSV 
library(inatpick)

Example: Drosera rotundifolia in the United Kingdom

In this example we download all observations of the round-leaved sundew (Drosera rotundifolia, taxon ID 52658) recorded in the United Kingdom (place ID 6857) by iNaturalist user andresrb.

Step 1 — Fetch observations 

obs <- inat_fetch(
  taxon_id   = 52658,      # Drosera rotundifolia
  place_id   = 6857,       # United Kingdom
  user_login = "andresrb"
)

nrow(obs)  # how many observations?

Step 2 — Filter by annotation

To focus only on observations where flowers are visible, use the annotation argument. Run inat_annotations to see all available options.

# See all annotation labels
inat_annotations

# Fetch only flowering observations
obs_flowering <- inat_fetch(
  taxon_id   = 52658,
  place_id   = 6857,
  user_login = "andresrb",
  annotation = "flowers"
)

Step 3 — Download photos

Download photos to a local folder. The size argument controls resolution: "square" (75px), "small" (240px), "medium" (500px), "large" (1024px, default), or "original".

inat_download(
  obs,
  out_dir = "drosera_photos",
  size    = "large"
)

Files are named obs{observation_id}_{photo_id}.jpg and saved to the specified folder. Already-downloaded files are skipped by default (overwrite = FALSE).

Step 4 — Export metadata to CSV 

inat_metadata(
  obs,
  path = "drosera_rotundifolia_uk.csv"
)

The CSV includes observation ID, date, taxon name, observer, place, coordinates, and number of photos.

Finding taxon and place IDs

IDs are visible directly in iNaturalist URLs:

  • Taxon ID: inaturalist.org/taxa/52658-Drosera-rotundifolia → 52658
  • Place ID: inaturalist.org/observations?place_id=6857 → 6857

Photo licenses

Photos downloaded from iNaturalist retain their original licenses as set by individual observers (CC0, CC-BY, CC-BY-NC, etc.). Use licensed = TRUE in inat_fetch() to restrict to CC-licensed photos only. Always credit the observer and respect the license terms when using images in research or publication.

# Only CC-licensed observations
obs_cc <- inat_fetch(
  taxon_id = 52658,
  place_id = 6857,
  licensed = TRUE
)

Further filtering options 

# Research-grade only, flowering, in July
obs_july <- inat_fetch(
  taxon_id      = 52658,
  place_id      = 6857,
  annotation    = "flowers",
  quality_grade = "research",
  month         = 7
)

Developed by Andrés Romero-Bravo.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
